steps.title: Identify the subject structure
steps.content: Subject: “The trefoil knot and the figure-eight knot” — two distinct items connected by “and”. The phrase “each with a crossing number below five” is parenthetical information that doesn't change this.

steps.title: Apply subject-verb agreement
steps.content:
Identify the grammar issue: subject-verb agreement. Rule: two subjects joined by "and" form a compound subject that takes a plural verb.
  • Choice A — was: singular past-tense verb; disagrees with compound subject "the trefoil knot and the figure-eight knot." ✗
  • Choice B — is: singular present-tense verb; disagrees with compound subject. ✗
  • Choice C — has been: singular present-perfect verb; disagrees with compound subject. ✗
  • Choice D — are: plural present-tense verb; agrees with compound subject. ✓
That matches Choice D — are.
